3:
How many I’ve stabbed, how many I’ve cut,
how many souls I’ve destroyed!
2:
I’ll knock your horns off, tear your mouth open,
gouge your peepers out! You’ll spend your whole life
working for medicine
I’ll knock your block off, rip your trap, and poke your peepers out! You’ll be working for medicine all your life!
5:
Stole, drank—went to prison.
Stole, drank—went to prison.
Romance!

Steal, get drunk — go to jail.
Steal, get drunk — go to jail.
Romantic!
6: - That’s it! No movie. The electricity’s run out.
- That’s it! No movie. The electricity’s all gone.
- That’s it! No movie. The electricity ran out.
7: - Move the knight, may I never see freedom again!
- Knight move, may I never see freedom again!
- Move the horse, I swear I'll never see freedom again!
Move the horse, I’ll never see the outside if I’m wrong!
8:
- Was there a pond?
- No. There were puddles.
Maybe a monument?
- There was a monument.
- Whose monument?
- How should I know? Some guy.
- With a beard? - No!
- With sideburns?
- I don’t remember. In a jacket!
- Sitting? - What?
- Sitting? - Who?
- That guy of yours!
- What a hick! You’re something else!
Who’s going to sit him down? It’s a monument!

Was there a square? — There was. — Maybe a monument? — There was a monument. — Whose monument? — How should I know? Some guy. — With a beard? — No! — With sideburns? — I don’t remember. He had a jacket! — Was he inside? — Who? — That guy of yours! — What a hick! Listen to you! Who’d put him inside? He’s a monument!

- Was there a pond?
- No. There were puddles.
Maybe a monument?
- There was a monument.
- Whose monument?
- How should I know? Some guy.
- With a beard? - No!
- With sideburns?
- I don’t remember. In a jacket!
- Sitting? - What?
- Is he sitting? - Who?
- That guy of yours!
- What a деревня! You’re something else!
Who would seat him? He’s a monument!
11:
Hey, citizen! Don’t go that way,
go this way,
or snow will hit your head—
you’ll be dead for good!

Hey, citizen! Don’t go that way,
go this way,
or snow will hit your head—
and you’ll be dead!

Hey, citizen! Don't go that way, go this way,
or snow will hit your head—
you'll be dead dead!

Hey, citizen! Don’t go that way—go this way,
or snow will hit your head—
you’ll be dead for good!

Hey, citizen! Don't go that way,
go this way,
or snow will hit your head—
you'll be dead as a doornail!

Hey, citizen! Don't go that way,
go this way,
or snow hit head—
you be dead all the way!

Hey, citizen! Don’t go that way,
go this way,
or snow will hit your head—
you’ll be dead as a doornail!

Hey, citizin! You don’t go there, you go here!
Snow fall on head — you be dead completely!

Hey, citizen! Don’t go that way,
go this way,
or snow will hit your head—
you’ll be dead for sure!
13:
why were you running?
- Everybody ran, so I ran.
9: This isn't some pocket change you’re swiping!
12: And in prison right now it’s dinner... pasta.
And in prison right now it's dinner... macaroni.
14: - Dinner is served! Sit down and eat, please.
Dinner is served! Please be seated and stuff your faces.
- Dinner is served! Please be seated and stuff your faces.

- And I’m Fedya.
What an idiot.

- And I’m Fedya.
What a fool.

- And mine's Fedya.
What an idiot.

- And mine is Fedya.

- Miss, what's your name? - Tanya.
- And I'm Fedya.

- And mine's Fedya.
What a dumb girl.

What a dummy.

17:
Sweetie, don’t you think your place
is by the toilet?

Sweetheart, don't you think your place
is by the shitter?

Sweetheart, don’t you think your place
is by the latrine bucket?

Sweetie, don’t you think your place
is by the latrine?
18: - Help! Hooligans are trying to blind me!
- Help! Hooligans are taking my eyesight!
- Help! Thugs are trying to blind me!
- Help! The hooligans are taking my eyesight!
1:
I’m the злой and scary big bad wolf,
I know a thing or two about piglets.

I’m the big bad wolf, so scary and so mean,
I know a thing or two about little pigs.

I'm a mean and scary big gray wolf,
I know a thing or two about piglets.

I'm a mean and scary big grey wolf,
and I know my piglets inside out.
4:
This Vasily Alibabayevich...
this... bad person...
dropped a radiator on my foot, the bastard!

This Vasily Alibabayevich...
this... bad person...
dropped a radiator on my foot, the scum!
